sections.paragraph:
Original: יהב

Transliteration: yehab

Phonetic: yeh-hab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to give, provide
    1. (Peal)
      1. to give
      2. to place, lay (foundations)
    2. (Hithp'al)
      1. to be given
      2. to be paid

Origin: corresponding to H3051

TWOT entry: 2766

Part(s) of speech: Verb
